output.formatted:
The first episode of Dragon Ball Z is "World's Strongest Man".

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?episodeLabel WHERE {
  ?episode rdfs:label "World's Strongest Man" @en ; rdfs:label ?episodeLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?episodeLabel) = "en")
}
LIMIT 1
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| episodeLabel                    |
| ------------------------------- |
| World's Strongest Man (lang:en) |
